texto: Take care when wandering about,in the wilds of the valley and heights of jagged rock.What a horrific garden of wonderland we have stumbled into; where a turn of one’s heel can lead to flowering jubilation, and another leads to the twisted and thorny thicket of despair....
explicacao: Citação de Kate Cullen sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Take care when wandering about,in the wilds of the valley and heights of jagged rock.What a horri…” articula reflexao, life-philosophy, wandering em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
